ab: mautang tu kaku tacudadan tu sananal.
en: I was late for school this morning.

ab: tayza i cacudada hawsa, makatawal aku mikelid ku kabung.
ch: 去學校的時候，我忘了帶書包。
en: When I was going to school, I forgot to bring my backpack.

ab: nayi’ ku nikelid aku tu canan a tuudan.
en: I didn't bring anything with me.

ab: micudad hawsa, mapulung miazih tu cudad kaku atu kaput.
ch: 上課的時候，我和同學一起看課本。
en: During class, I and my classmates read the textbook together.

ab: miseking hawsa, pacaliwen nu kaput kaku tu sapisulit atu sabulic.
ch: 考試的時候，同學借我筆和橡皮擦。
en: During the exam, a classmate lent me a pen and an eraser.

ab: sakamu sa ku saydan takuwan, “anuayaw katabal mulkal tu sananal, amana tu kautang!”
ch: 老師跟我說：「下次早點起床，不要再遲到了!」
en: The teacher told me, "Wake up earlier next time and don't be late again!"
